Control No.

column6: Information security for use of cloud services
column8: The bank does not use cloud services (public, private, or hybrid) in line with internal policy and CBE regulatory restrictions.
Remote working is prohibited by bank policy; all work is performed within secured bank premises.
The bank does not perform in-house application or software development.

column6: Security testing in development and acceptance
column8: No internal software development or system acceptance testing is performed by the bank.

column6: Separation of development, test, and production environments
column8: No internal development or test environments exist within the bank.
Privileged utility programs are not used; system administration is restricted to controlled vendor-supported tools only.
Controls related to industrial or manufacturing utilities are not relevant to banking office environments.

column6: Secure disposal or reuse of equipment
column8: Equipment is not reused outside the bank; disposal is handled entirely by certified third-party vendors under contract.
